name: gws-install
description: Quick install of the Google Workspace CLI (gws) on an additional machine using existing OAuth credentials. Requires client_secret.json from a previous gws-setup. Use when setting up gws on a new computer, reinstalling after a fresh OS, or configuring a second workstation. Triggers: "install gws", "gws on new machine", "gws install", "set up gws again".
